name: rothy Intelligence API
description: E-commerce and business intelligence API for AI agents. Analyze any Shopify store, research Amazon products with Opportunity Scoring, and find qualified sales leads from Google Maps — all via x402 micropayments on Base. No signup required.
author: rothy

tools.name: shopify_analyze
tools.description: Analyze any public Shopify store — products, pricing, collections, installed apps, and theme detection. No API key required.

tools.name: shopify_products
tools.description: Paginated product catalog from any Shopify store.

tools.name: amazon_search
tools.description: Search Amazon products with Opportunity Score (0-100), niche gap detection, and competition analysis.

tools.name: amazon_product
tools.description: Deep ASIN analysis with FBA profitability estimate and Opportunity Score.

tools.name: maps_search
tools.description: Search Google Maps businesses with Lead Quality Score (0-100). Requires Google Places API key.

tools.name: maps_leads
tools.description: Find qualified sales leads with outreach hints. Returns hot and warm leads filtered by quality score.
